title: [YTP] Race Speeder Won't Share His Milk
description:
Why are our parents so bad at milking us?

Sources: Awesome Racer, parody of Speed Racer, made by HotDiggedyDemon. Awesome Racer is based off Egoraptor's Awesome Series.

Song is "Ridin' Dirty" by Chamillionaire. I do not own it. Please don't milk me.

OVER 6,000 views? 50 favorites? I love you guys :)
